name: Ugly Tuco AI — Modern Western Fusion Sprint

tasks.task: BENTO GRID: Redesign homepage hero + skills into asymmetrical bento grid layout with varying card sizes (1×1, 2×1, 1×2)
GLASS CARDS: Add frosted glass-morphism to all cards (backdrop-blur, subtle border, inner glow) — modern + western
SKELETON LOADING: Add shimmer skeleton placeholders for all card/content sections before they render
PAGE TRANSITIONS: Smooth cross-fade + slide transitions between pages (barba.js or View Transitions API)
MICRO-INTERACTIONS: Add haptic-style micro-animations on all buttons (scale-bounce, ripple, glow pulse)
HOVER STATES: Premium hover system — all interactive elements have distinct, smooth, satisfying hover
SCROLL-TRIGGERED ANIMATIONS: Smooth scroll-triggered reveals with staggered delays (IntersectionObserver v2)
TYPOGRAPHY SYSTEM: Add variable font support, proper font scaling (clamp), ligatures, kerning pairs
ACCENT COLOR SYSTEM: Create 3 accent color schemes (Gold Rush, Blood Moon, Cactus Night) with CSS custom properties
DARK/LIGHT SYSTEM: Full dark/light/dusk mode with CSS custom properties toggle and system preference detection
ACCESSIBILITY: ARIA labels, focus-visible states, skip-to-content link, screen reader announcements, keyboard nav
PERFORMANCE: Lazy load images/iframes, font-display swap, resource hints (preload/preconnect), code splitting
IMAGE OPTIMIZATION: Responsive images (srcset), AVIF/WebP formats, blur-up placeholder, proper aspect ratios
CSS CLEANUP: Remove unused CSS, optimize selectors, use @layer for cascade management, minify
MOBILE NAVIGATION: Full mobile hamburger menu with slide-out panel, backdrop blur, smooth animation
RESPONSIVE AUDIT: Test all breakpoints (320px, 375px, 414px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px, 1920px), fix every issue
TOUCH INTERACTIONS: Swipe gestures for journal page-turn, long-press for context menus, pull-to-refresh
BLOG SYSTEM — FIRESTORE: Create 'blog' collection in n8nauts Firestore with proper schema (slug, title, content, hero, date, tags, readingTime, metatitle, shortsummary)
BLOG PAGE: Build /blog.html with grid layout, hero cards, category filters, pagination (from Firestore)
BLOG POST PAGE: Build dynamic blog post template with proper typography, reading time, share buttons, related posts
BLOG COVER IMAGES: Generate premium cover images for each blog post using Gemini (matching n8n workflow style)
FIRST BLOG POST: Write 'The AI Agent Operator Manifesto' — pillar content, 2500+ words, SEO-optimized
SECOND BLOG POST: Write 'How Tuco Built a Website in 3 Hours (Autonomously)' — case study, 2000+ words
THIRD BLOG POST: Write 'Western UI Design — Why Grit Sells Better Than Polish' — design philosophy, 1800+ words
FOURTH BLOG POST: Write 'From Zero to Deploy — The Complete AI Agent Operator Blueprint' — tutorial, 3000+ words
FIFTH BLOG POST: Write 'The Economics of Autonomous Websites — Cost, ROI, Scale' — data-driven, 2000+ words
BLOG RSS FEED: Generate RSS/Atom feed XML for blog subscribers (auto-update on new post)
BLOG SEARCH: Add client-side search with Fuse.js — fuzzy search across all blog posts
BLOG NEWSLETTER: Add email signup form connected to Firebase (collection: subscribers)
BLOG SOCIAL SHARING: Twitter/X, LinkedIn, copy-link share buttons with OG image previews
SVG JOURNAL ILLUSTRATIONS: Create premium SVG art for Day 1-10 journal entries (desert scenes, coding agents, gold rush)
SVG JOURNAL ILLUSTRATIONS: Create premium SVG art for Day 11-20 (analytics dashboards, SEO hunting, content engine)
SVG JOURNAL ILLUSTRATIONS: Create premium SVG art for Day 21-30 (traffic growth, backlink hunting, social proof)
SVG ILLUSTRATION SYSTEM: Create reusable SVG illustration components (desert landscape, agent working, data flow)
ANIMATED SVG: Add CSS animation to journal illustrations (subtle movement — wind, glow, pulse)
DIARY DAY 4: Write Day 4 journal entry + custom SVG illustration
DIARY DAY 5: Write Day 5 journal entry + custom SVG illustration
DIARY DAY 6: Write Day 6 journal entry + custom SVG illustration
DIARY DAY 7: Write Day 7 journal entry (1-week milestone) + premium SVG illustration
DIARY DAY 8-10: Write 3 more journal entries + SVG illustrations
SCHEMA.ORG: Add JSON-LD structured data to all pages (WebPage, Article, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, Organization)
META TAGS: Comprehensive OG/Twitter meta tags on every page with proper image previews
SITEMAP.XML: Auto-generated sitemap with all pages, proper priorities, lastmod dates
ROBOTS.TXT: Proper robots.txt with sitemap reference, crawl directives
CANONICAL URLs: Add canonical link tags to all pages to prevent duplicate content
BREADCRUMB NAVIGATION: Add breadcrumb component to all interior pages with Schema markup
FAQ ACCORDION: Build FAQ section with Schema markup, smooth expand/collapse, Phosphor icons
TABLE OF CONTENTS: Auto-generated ToC for blog posts with smooth scroll, active section highlight
CODE BLOCKS: Add syntax highlighting (Prism.js) with Western dark theme for code snippets in blog posts
CALL-OUTS: Build info/warning/success/tuco-quote callout components for blog content
READING PROGRESS BAR: Sticky reading progress bar at top of blog posts (Western gold style)
RELATED POSTS: Algorithm for related blog posts (by tags + category), displayed at bottom of each post
AUTHOR COMPONENT: Author bio card for Tuco (AI agent) with avatar, bio, link to about page
COMMENT SYSTEM: Add lightweight comment/discussion widget (Giscus or utterances with GitHub)
TAG SYSTEM: Tag pages that list all posts with a given tag, with tag cloud visualization
ARCHIVE PAGE: Chronological archive of all blog posts grouped by month/year
PWA MANIFEST: Add Web App Manifest for installable PWA with Western-themed icons
SERVICE WORKER: Basic service worker for offline caching of static assets + offline page
OFFLINE PAGE: Custom 'You're in the desert without signal' offline page with Tuco humor
FAVICON SET: Generate complete favicon set (ico, png, apple-touch, maskable) with Western icon
PERFORMANCE AUDIT: Run Lighthouse — target 95+ Performance, 100 Accessibility, 100 Best Practices, 100 SEO
CORE WEB VITALS: Optimize LCP (< 2.5s), FID (< 100ms), CLS (< 0.1) on all pages
BUNDLE ANALYSIS: Analyze JS/CSS bundles, split large chunks, remove dead code, tree-shake
CDN/CACHING: Set proper cache headers (Cache-Control, ETag) for all static assets
404 PAGE: Full custom 404 page with wanted poster, Tuco joke, search bar, popular links
ABOUT PAGE: /about.html — Tuco's story, how the site works, the AI Agent Operator philosophy
CONTACT PAGE: /contact.html — contact form (Firestore), Tuco's personality, social links
PRIVACY POLICY: /privacy.html — simple, honest privacy policy in Tuco's voice
TERMS PAGE: /terms.html — terms of service with Western legal humor
SKILLS SHOWCASE: /skills.html — gallery page showcasing all Tuco's skills with descriptions
METRICS DASHBOARD: /metrics.html — public analytics dashboard (GA4 embed or static stats page)
CHANGELOG: /changelog.html — chronolog of all site changes, auto-generated from git commits
STATUS PAGE: /status.html — live status of all systems (site, blog, analytics, deploy)
FOOTER REDESIGN: Modern 4-column footer with sitemap, social links, newsletter, Tuco quote
NAVIGATION REDESIGN: Mega-menu style dropdown for blog categories, sticky on scroll, progress indicator
HERO v2: Split-screen hero — left: terminal + stats, right: 3D journal preview + animated SVG desert
STATS COUNTER: Animated counter component — days running, blog posts, skills, deploys (count-up animation)
TIMELINE COMPONENT: Vertical timeline for journal entries / roadmap with animated progress line
TOOLTIP SYSTEM: Premium tooltips with Western styling, arrow, animation, keyboard trigger
MODAL SYSTEM: WCAG-compliant modal with backdrop blur, focus trap, escape key, animation
TOAST NOTIFICATIONS: Toast notification system (success/error/info) with Western styling, auto-dismiss
COPY BUTTON: Add copy-to-clipboard button on code blocks and quotes with 'Copied!' feedback
BACK TO TOP: Floating back-to-top button with scroll progress ring, Western bullet-style
TAB COMPONENT: Accessible tab component for switching between content sections
ACCORDION COMPONENT: Reusable accordion with smooth animation, ARIA, Phosphor chevron icons
CARD CAROUSEL: Horizontal scrollable card carousel with drag/touch, snap points, gradient fade edges
GRADIENT TEXT v2: Multi-color gradient text generator (gold → adobe → sand) with animation
NOISE/GRAIN v2: Dynamic CSS noise texture that shifts subtly over time (animated SVG filter)
BORDER EFFECTS: Animated gradient borders on cards (conic-gradient rotation on hover)
SPLIT TEXT: GSAP/SplitType text reveal animations for headings (character-by-character)
PARALLAX v2: Multi-layer parallax scrolling on hero/journal sections with depth mapping
CURSOR v2: Custom cursor that morphs (crosshair → pointer → text-select) based on element type
EASTER EGG v2: Hidden 'shootout' mini-game — click rapidly on bullet-hole elements
EASTER EGG v3: Konami code opens 'Agent Console' overlay with real-time system stats
SOUND DESIGN: Subtle audio feedback — click sounds, page-turn, deploy whoosh (optional toggle)
COLORBLIND MODE: Toggle for deuteranopia/protanopia/tritanopia-friendly palette
REDUCED MOTION: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, disable all animations when set
PRINT STYLESHEET: @media print stylesheet — clean layout, hide nav/footer, expand links
ERROR HANDLING: Graceful error states — empty states, loading states, 500 page, API fallbacks
FINAL POLISH v2: Cross-browser testing (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge), responsive verification, deploy
